name: Canteen Golf & Billiards, Inc.
about: Canteen Golf & Billiards is a dual-venue facility offering both high-end golf simulation and augmented reality billiards. The venue utilizes eight Trackman-powered golf bays that can accommodate up to four guests each, with access to over 300 global courses and a variety of practice modes. Their six Olhausen billiards tables feature augmented reality technology for interactive gameplay. The facility operates on a peak and off-peak schedule, offering members 24/7 access. Canteen provides a full-service bar and kitchen, serving food, drinks, and hosting customized events from small birthdays to large corporate gatherings. It is positioned as an affordable entertainment hub in Metro Detroit, offering a mix of sports, technology, and social dining.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology used by PGA and LPGA professionals
Affordable pricing with a summer rate of $25/hour
Family-friendly environment with a wide variety of games and activities
24/7 member access for flexible practice and play
Full food and beverage service available on-site

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service including appetizers, award-winning pizzas, sandwiches, burgers, desserts, and a catering menu.
Full bar with 40+ beers, drafts, canned/bottled beverages, mixed drinks, shots, and bottomless Coca-Cola products.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art radar technology used by PGA and LPGA; eight bays available, each holding up to four guests.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, loaner adult clubs are available for $15 per session, and kid's sets are free. However, bringing your own clubs is recommended as loaner sets may not be complete.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, all food and drink must be purchased through the venue. Members may bring their own non-alcoholic snacks and drinks when the facility is closed to the public, but no alcohol is allowed during non-public hours.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a standard time for 18 holes. Booking is done by the hour, and it is recommended to book online to guarantee availability, especially on weekends.

faq.question: Is Canteen kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Canteen is a family-friendly establishment. Kids and teens can enjoy the golf games, learn to play pool, and access the arcade with ticket redemption games and Pokémon center.
